title: Zoho Campaigns vs Customer.io (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Zoho Campaigns vs Customer.io: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Zoho Campaigns vs Customer.io: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Zoho Campaigns and Customer.io comes down to your specific use case. Zoho Campaigns is built for Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses, while Customer.io targets product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

comparison_table.tool_b: Product And Growth Teams Sending Behaviour-Triggered Messages

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages

faq.q: Is Zoho Campaigns better than Customer.io?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Zoho Campaigns wins for Zoho users and budget-conscious businesses, while Customer.io is stronger for product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Zoho Campaigns or Customer.io?
faq.a: Zoho Campaigns starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Customer.io to Zoho Campaigns?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
